things.name: Stari Most (Old Bridge)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 16th-century Ottoman bridge rebuilt after its 1993 destruction - symbol of reconciliation

things.name: Old Town (Stari Grad)
things.description: Cobblestone Ottoman bazaar with coppersmith workshops, jewellers and traditional coffee houses

things.name: Koski Mehmed Pasha Mosque
things.description: Ottoman mosque with a minaret you can climb for the best views of Stari Most

things.name: Muslibegovic House
things.description: 18th-century Ottoman house museum and the finest surviving example of Ottoman domestic architecture

things.name: Blagaj Tekke & Spring
things.description: Sufi monastery built into a cliff at the source of the Buna River - a magical setting

things.name: Kravice Waterfalls
things.description: Bosnia's miniature Niagara - a 25m high circular waterfall on the Trebizat River

things.name: War Photo Museum
things.description: Harrowing and essential museum documenting the 1992-95 siege of Mostar

things.name: Partisans' Cemetery
things.description: Monumental 1965 Bogdan Bogdanovic design - a secular WWII cemetery in stunning marble

things.name: Spanish Square
things.description: West Mostar's social hub with cafes and a symbolic meeting point between communities

things.name: Bridge Diving Show
things.description: Local divers plunge 21m from Stari Most - a tradition going back to the 17th century
